images.prompt: Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: I felt a little disappointment when my friend couldn't come over to play today.. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: Lily felt **disappointment** when her balloon popped before she could show it to her friends.. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

Create a single-frame cartoon illustration in flat vector style with clean outlines, bright saturated colors, simple friendly shapes, and a white background. The scene depicts: I felt disappointment when it started to rain and we couldn't go to the park.. Do not include any text, letters, or words in the image.

G1.definition: It's a sad feeling you get when something you hoped for or really wanted to happen doesn't happen.
G1.example: I felt disappointment when it started to rain and we couldn't go to the park.
G1.tryIt: What would make you feel disappointment? Maybe if your friend couldn't come over to play?

K.definition: It's when you feel a little sad because something you really hoped for didn't happen the way you wanted.
K.example: Lily felt **disappointment** when her balloon popped before she could show it to her friends.
K.tryIt: Think of a time you were really hoping for a sunny day to play outside, but it rained instead. That's a feeling of disappointment!

preK.definition: It's a little sad feeling you get when something you hoped for doesn't happen.
preK.example: I felt a little disappointment when my friend couldn't come over to play today.
preK.tryIt: What might make you feel a little disappointment?
